overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white coat exploring a futuristic classroom or training facility. The character walks among seated students in green uniforms, examines whiteboards with lesson content, and observes the industrial interior with metal flooring and utilitarian design while an instructor moves about the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic classroom with rows of glass desks

events.description: character approaches the instructor standing at the front near the whiteboard

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom between rows of desks toward the front whiteboard area

notable_agents.action: instructor standing near the whiteboard holding a book or tablet
student in green uniform seated at desk looking at a tablet device

entered.detail: glass-topped desks with metal frames arranged in rows
large whiteboard with charts and diagrams on the left side of the front wall
whiteboard with red text reading 'Remember, always double check your work'
metal safety railing along the left side walkway
low white storage cabinets beneath the whiteboards
tall glass-fronted cabinet with metal frame on the right side of the room

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through a futuristic classroom with industrial metal flooring and glass-topped desks. Students in green uniforms are seated at their desks while an instructor stands near the front whiteboards. The camera follows the character as they approach the front teaching area.

scene_state.functional_zone: front teaching area with dual whiteboards and storage

events.description: instructor sits down on the storage cabinet while continuing to read from a book

agents.ego_description: walking along the front whiteboards examining the lesson content and instructional diagrams

notable_agents.action: instructor sitting on storage cabinet reading from an open book

segments.scene_description: The character explores the front teaching area, walking past whiteboards displaying instructional content. The instructor transitions from standing to sitting on the storage cabinets while reading. The glass display cabinet becomes more prominent on the right as the character moves along the front wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: student desk area with educational posters on back wall

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the student desks
character stops walking and stands observing the classroom from the central aisle

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the student area and standing to observe the classroom from the central aisle

notable_agents.action: instructor standing near the desks holding papers and looking at students
student in green uniform seated at desk looking up toward the instructor

entered.detail: blue poster with colorful astronaut figures on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back toward the student area, passing rows of desks. The instructor is now standing near the students holding papers. A colorful educational poster is visible on the back wall. The character comes to a stop in the central aisle, observing the classroom scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic classroom that shifts from a focused approach toward the teaching area to a broad observation of the entire student environment. It begins by following a character in a white coat across industrial metal flooring and past glass-topped desks where students in green uniforms are seated. As the character reaches the front of the room, the camera glides past whiteboards filled with instructional content and a glass display cabinet while the instructor transitions from standing to sitting on nearby storage cabinets. The scene then shifts as the character turns and walks back through the rows of desks, passing the instructor who is now standing with papers in hand. Finally, the camera comes to a stop in the central aisle, revealing a colorful educational poster on the back wall as the character observes the full layout of the facility.
